Class cashierController

java.lang.Object
org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierController
public class cashierController extends Object
Controller for the cashier point-of-sale JavaFX view. This controller initializes menu and order tables, manages order interactions, supports adding seasonal menu items with optional recipe mappings, and handles cashier navigation actions such as logout and returning to manager view.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    cashierController()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addMenuItem()
    Opens a dialog to add a new menu item, optionally with recipe ingredients, then refreshes the menu table on success.
    void
    addOrder()
    Adds the currently selected menu item to the active order and updates total.
    void
    goBackToManager()
    Navigates from cashier view to the manager dashboard.
    void
    initialize()
    Initializes JavaFX table bindings, model state, and the real-time clock.
    void
    logout()
    Navigates from cashier view back to the login screen.
    void
    removeOrder()
    Removes the currently selected order item and updates total.
    void
    setEmployeeInfo(String name, int employeeNo, String role)
    Injects employee details into the cashier view after login.
    void
    submitOrder()
    Submits the current order to persistence and resets the local order state.

  • Constructor Details

    • cashierController

      public cashierController()

  • Method Details

    • setEmployeeInfo

      public void setEmployeeInfo(String name, int employeeNo, String role)
      Injects employee details into the cashier view after login. If the role is manager, manager-only controls are made visible.
      Parameters:
      name - display name of the logged-in employee
      employeeNo - numeric employee identifier
      role - employee role used for UI permissions

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes JavaFX table bindings, model state, and the real-time clock. This method is invoked by the JavaFX runtime after FXML injection.

    • addMenuItem

      public void addMenuItem()
      Opens a dialog to add a new menu item, optionally with recipe ingredients, then refreshes the menu table on success.

    • addOrder

      public void addOrder()
      Adds the currently selected menu item to the active order and updates total.

    • removeOrder

      public void removeOrder()
      Removes the currently selected order item and updates total.

    • submitOrder

      public void submitOrder()
      Submits the current order to persistence and resets the local order state.

    • logout

      public void logout()
      Navigates from cashier view back to the login screen.

    • goBackToManager

      public void goBackToManager()
      Navigates from cashier view to the manager dashboard.
